title: ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
company: ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners:
ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners!
